name: public-threat-actor-monitor
title: Fresh Threat Actor & Ransomware Activity Monitor
description: Monitor fresh public threat actor and ransomware activity. Get safe metadata rows for actors, victims or targets, sectors, countries, TTPs, confidence, freshness, and source provenance without raw leaked data.
